text:
It was on a quiet evening, after the sun had dipped behind the trees, that Leo found the most extraordinary animal. It was a small bird with plumage like molten silver, flitting from bush to bush. Its song was like a gentle melody.

Every time Leo listened to it, he felt a warmth that made him feel oddly grateful.

One evening, while wandering through the forest, Leo discovered a small burrow.Entering it, he found a nest full of tiny, glittering eggs. He decided to keep them.

Every day Leo took the eggs out and fed them tiny insects.

When they were ready to hatch, Leo carefully lifted one out.

"Goodbye," it chirped. Leo gave it a tiny kiss.

That night Leo snuck out and released them.

The next morning the tiny bird fluttered down into his palm. It was so tiny yet majestic. Leo named it Luna.

They spent days exploring the forest together. Luna could sing like no bird Leo had ever
